afterSnapshot.name: testWindAlertEndpoint

context.userMessage: Approved — build it, then run the tests and checks to verify.

rationale: Integration test that the live /api/wind-alert endpoint returns a well-formed alert payload.
implementation: Fetches the endpoint with valid coords and validates the payload shape: alert boolean, numeric gusts, default threshold of 25, non-empty message, and echoed position/timezone.
